method: v2.3: rank causes → choose capture → lock confirmed shape that captures the cause. Weights P25/Hitter-shape40/Env15/Lineup12/Src8. PROXY shape mode (no Statcast) — hitter scores capped.

legend.B: cause fired + teammate hit (right cause, wrong capture)
legend.C: cause did not fire + bat missed (true miss)
legend.D: cause did not fire + bat hit (override/lucky)

audit_template.instructions: After games, set result_hr / cause_fired (did target pitcher or team produce HRs/barrels) / teammate_hr, then classify outcome A-D.
